title: [FIRRTL] Use enum class for kind/flow, fix fallthrough warnings
body: Use `enum class` for the `Flow` and `Kind` enums, which allows them to be moved out of their namespace (since the enum creates one). Also factor out the `swapFlow` function which was used in the parser and the ops impl. Add a default `llvm_unreachable()` in the flow switch stmt, as GCC complained about the enclosing function reaching end with no return.
